description_long: This is a vividly colored sculpture of the Hindu deity Ganesha, depicted seated in a cross-legged posture on a rectangular base. The figure features a large, ornate golden crown, prominent elephant head with a curved trunk, and four arms holding symbolic objects. The body is adorned with jewelry, including necklaces and armlets, and the attire consists of a red dhoti with gold accents. The sculpture is painted in shades of pink, red, gold, and white, with detailed facial features and expressive eyes. The base is dark with a blue border, providing contrast to the bright figure above.
description: A brightly painted sculpture of Ganesha seated cross-legged, adorned with a golden crown, jewelry, and red attire on a rectangular base.
description_view_0: Front view showing Ganesha's face, crown, trunk, four arms with objects, and detailed jewelry and attire.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, trunk, and the layered crown, with one arm and hand visible holding an object.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, crown, and the draped clothing, with both arms and the base visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, trunk, and crown, with the right arm and hand holding an object.
attribute_subject_matter: Ganesha seated in a traditional pose with crown and ornaments
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
